scripts.build: python3 -m pip install --break-system-packages -r requirements.txt || python3 -m pip install --user -r requirements.txt || python -m pip install --break-system-packages -r requirements.txt || python -m pip install --user -r requirements.txt
scripts.start: python3 -m streamlit run app.py --server.port ${PORT:-8501} --server.address 0.0.0.0 --server.headless true || python -m streamlit run app.py --server.port ${PORT:-8501} --server.address 0.0.0.0 --server.headless true
